arts.ttl: Pep Lijnders sees public Liverpool comments backfire as Anfield duo left in the cold
arts.sum: Pep Lijnders spent six years as Jurgen Klopp's trusted lieutenant at Liverpool, but was sacked by Red Bull Salzburg earlier this week after a disastrous spell in charge of the Austrian side

arts.ttl: Liverpool reservation over Frimpong signing revealed
arts.sum: Liverpool are admirers of Bayer Leverkusen full-back Jeremie Frimpong but have reservations over a potential transfer. Frimpong has been placed on a shortlist of potential targets should Trent Alexander-Arnold depart at the end of the season. arts.ttl: Thiago Alcantara to get coach role after Liverpool exit – Job at CL club can be closed by January
arts.sum: Thiago Alcantara could be set to return to Barcelona in a coaching role in the January transfer window as he works on his career after leaving Liverpool in the summer. That’s according to Marca, who report that a deal for the former Liverpool man could be done in January as Barcelona eye another reunion. arts.ttl: Manager ‘seeks to distance himself’ from Southampton vacancy drama – No serious worry building yet
arts.sum: Southampton are yet to appoint a new manager after parting ways with Russell Martin at the weekend. The Premier League side have been linked to a few candidates including Santa Clara boss Vasco Matos. This was initially reported in the UK and these claims were relayed by the Portuguese press. arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher exposes Liverpool Premier League title race weakness in surprise Chelsea point
arts.sum: Liverpool news as club legend Jamie Carragher has given his verdict on the Premier League title race, with the Reds currently leading the way in the table

arts.ttl: 'I woke village up when Liverpool won Champions League - but I rejected them for Arsenal'
arts.sum: Theo Walcott once admitted he 'went mad' when Liverpool won the Champions League but then snubbed them for Arsenal - going on to produce some memorable moments against the Reds

Liverpool have ‘no intention’ of pursuing Real Madrid swap deal
arts.sum: Liverpool have no intention of pursuing a swap deal with Real Madrid involving Ryan Gravenberch and Aurelien Tchouameni. Real Madrid are understood to have been impressed by Gravenberch’s performances this season with the midfielder having developed into a key figure for the Reds.
